exemplar.title: How does the World Wildlife Fund use stylistic devices and visual techniques in the Public Service Announcement campaign titled âFireman, Boat, Ambulanceâ to emphasize the negative impact of humans on the earth's natural environment?

detailedExemplarData.title: How does the World Wildlife Fund use stylistic devices and visual techniques in the Public Service Announcement campaign titled âFireman, Boat, Ambulanceâ to emphasize the negative impact of humans on the earth's natural environment?

subject.title: English Lang & Lit (Old)
subject.description: IB English Language & Literature combines the study of language and literature, analyzing both literary and non-literary texts across various media and contexts. Students explore how language shapes meaning, identity, and culture through critical examination of diverse text types including advertisements, speeches, novels, and digital media. The course develops analytical skills, cultural understanding, and critical thinking about communication in different contexts and purposes.

strengths: Sustained and coherent interpretation of all three PSAs linking back to the guiding question
Well-chosen references to lighting, symbolism and irony that support the central thesis
Demonstrates a strong grasp of the workâs broader implications about human priorities
weaknesses: Occasional moralising language weakens subtlety of argument
Citation formatting inconsistencies suggest uneven attention to scholarly conventions
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Although the occasional broad moralising slightly dilutes depth, the essay exhibits overall persuasive and sustained interpretation of the PSAs. References are well-chosen and effectively support the central ideas, elevating the work to the top band for knowledge and interpretation.

strengths: Analysis of situational irony, antithesis and juxtaposition is appropriate and occasionally insightful
Effective evaluation of how visual elements reinforce WWFâs message
Accurate identification of rhetorical devices underpinning the essayâs argument
weaknesses: Some sections remain descriptive and would benefit from deeper exploration of authorial intent
Evaluation of persuasive effectiveness is sometimes brief and could be more consistently sustained
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The essay moves beyond description to deliver largely appropriate and at times insightful analysis of textual features. While not uniformly convincing throughout, the strengths in identifying and evaluating key devices justify a Band 4 award.

strengths: Clear structure with a logical introduction, three PSA-focused body sections and a concluding synthesis
Cohesive organization that generally maintains the line of inquiry
Supporting examples are mostly integrated into the flow of the argument
weaknesses: Some paragraphs are overly long and contain abrupt shifts from description to judgement
Conclusion does not fully synthesize analytical insights back to the research question
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The response is well organized and mostly cohesive, with a clear line of inquiry and generally effective integration of evidence. Minor lapses in paragraph development and conclusion prevent top-band performance, placing it securely in Band 4.

strengths: Language is generally clear and the academic register is maintained
Vocabulary choices like âjuxtapositionâ and ânegligenceâ effectively communicate analysis
weaknesses: Frequent small errors in grammar and typos (e.g. âvellow,â ârepresntsâ) detract from precision
Occasional shifts to first-person and incomplete sentences disrupt formal tone
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: While the writing is mostly clear and appropriate for an academic essay, recurring lapses in accuracy and consistency in register limit the work to Band 3 for language.

strandSelections.reasoning: Supporting examples from the images are **sometimes smoothly embedded** (e.g. integrating the slogan inside the sentence), but elsewhere the prose isolates evidence in stand-alone sentences or parenthetical labels. Quoted diction (âemergency,â âact nowâ) is incorporated but not always grammatically stitched into analysis.  This intermittent effectiveness aligns with Band 3: examples are âsometimes integrated into sentences and paragraphs.â

The student demonstrates **solid familiarity with the three PSA images and their intended environmental message**. Key elements such as lighting, focal placement, irony and symbolism are accurately identified, and the essay links these choices to the overarching idea of âmisplaced human priorities.â  Interpretation is **sustained through all body paragraphs**; each advertisement is consistently tied back to the guiding question about humanityâs negative impact.  However, the exploration occasionally slips into broad moralising (e.g. âglobal annihilation is inevitableâ) rather than probing subtler implications, so the depth is not quite âpersuasiveâ or âexcellent.â  Overall, the work aligns best with the descriptor for good knowledge and sustained interpretation (Band 4).

The response has a clear introduction, three body sections mirroring the PSA triad, and a conclusion, showing **adequate logical structure**. Topic sentences guide the reader and the line of inquiry is visible, though at times the argument drifts into repetition. Cohesion within paragraphs is unevenâsome abrupt shifts from description to judgementâbut overall organisation is satisfactory, matching Band 3 descriptors of being âadequately organized with some development of line of inquiry.â

References to the visual texts are **generally relevant and frequent**; the student quotes the recurring slogan, points to lighting contrasts, and cites specific actions of firefighters, coastguards and paramedics as evidence.  These details support most assertions, but the support is sometimes **descriptive rather than analytical** and a few claims (e.g. capitalist critique) are asserted without concrete visual proof.  Academic footnotes are limited to background sources rather than analytical evidence.  This places the work in Band 3: references are âgenerally relevant and mostly supportâ the ideas.

The student maintains an **academic essay register** with thesis-driven paragraphs, third-person discussion of WWF, and formal vocabulary (ânegligence,â âjuxtapositionâ).  Occasional shifts to inclusive first-person (âIf we, as a communityâ) and moralistic tone slightly weaken consistency, yet overall style remains âmostly appropriate to the task,â aligning with Band 3 rather than the seamless control demanded at Band 4.

Language is **generally clear and comprehensible**; readers can follow the argument without difficulty.  Minor lapses in word choice, agreement, and typos (âvellow,â ârepresnts,â missing articles) occur regularly but do not impede meaning, corresponding to Band 3âs âadequate accuracy â¦ despite some lapses.â Precision and sophistication required for Band 4 are not consistently present.

The essay moves beyond pure description by analysing devices such as **situational irony, antithesis, symbolism, high-/low-key lighting and juxtaposition**.  These points are appropriate and sometimes evaluative (e.g. discussion of consumerism), fulfilling the Band 3 requirement of âgenerally appropriate analysis.â  Nonetheless, many passages still narrate what is visible (âthere is a flaming boatâ) without deeper exploration of authorial intention, and evaluation of effectiveness is brief.  Insight and conviction are intermittent rather than sustained, so Band 4 is not yet met.

annotations.comment: This sentence is incomplete and disrupts flow. Ensure every sentence is fully formed to maintain academic tone and clarity.
The research question is concise and clearly frames the analytical focus on stylistic devices and visual techniques, providing a strong foundation for the essay.
The introduction broadly outlines WWFâs mission but lacks a clear thesis previewing the key stylistic devices. Refine the opening to state explicitly which devices will be analysed.
Sentence structure here is unclear (âHence its being one of the later things noticedâ¦â). Revise to improve grammatical accuracy and clarity of meaning.
Analysis here remains largely descriptive. Deepen your evaluation by explaining how situational irony shapes audience response and reinforces WWFâs persuasive aims.
Footnotes only cite background sources. Incorporate analytical or theoretical references to strengthen textual support beyond descriptive detail.
This long, complex sentence on consumerism becomes unwieldy. Break into smaller clauses to enhance readability and sharpen your critique of capitalist critique.
The opening clause is truncated (âIn the PSA titled âBoat,ââ¦ utilize to illustrateâ). Revise to present a complete thought before proceeding.
The identification of the antithesis between the Coast Guard and sinking boat is accurate and shows solid grasp of visual rhetoric.
This paragraph covers multiple devices and becomes lengthy. Split into two paragraphs to focus separately on lighting contrasts and diction analysis.
The claim of a capitalist critique needs concrete visual evidence (e.g., brand logos, price tags). Link specific imagery to this broader claim.
The disconnected phrase at the start (âurgent dictionâ¦â) needs full integration into a sentence to clarify the analysis point.
The student effectively highlights how the âAmbulanceâ PSA uses visual juxtaposition to symbolize human negligence versus natureâs resilience.
Typographical errors (âvellowâ, ârepresntsâ) detract from precision. Proofread to ensure vocabulary accuracy and maintain credibility.
Your conclusion summarizes points but does not revisit the guiding question or weave in analytical insights. Strengthen by synthesizing your arguments in relation to the thesis.
The first-person appeal (âIf we, as a communityâ) shifts away from the objective academic register. Maintain third-person discussion for consistency.
The assertion of âglobal annihilation is inevitableâ broadens into moralizing. Focus instead on nuanced interpretation of the PSAsâ implications.
Bibliography header is clearly labelled and distinct from main content, aiding navigation.
Citation formatting is inconsistent (e.g., missing italics, punctuation). Adopt a single citation style (MLA/APA) for consistency.
The second bibliography entry lacks proper punctuation around the title. Revise to follow consistent reference formatting conventions.
When discussing the PSA visuals, explicitly describe elements of the image rather than referring broadly; this will strengthen your analytical examples.
The paragraph on âBoatâ would benefit from exploring how the color palette directs viewer attention, enhancing your analysis of lighting.
Your interpretation of visual juxtaposition in âAmbulanceâ is insightful and convincingly tied to the essayâs argument.
Overall, paragraphs often exceed five sentences. Shorter paragraphs focusing on one device at a time will improve clarity and cohesion.
Consider adding brief signposting sentences at the start of each PSA section to reinforce how each example ties back to the research question.
